title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Shoppers Stop

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Shoppers Stop
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Shoppers Stop! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Shoppers Stop:
Shoppers Stop is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
